response.overview: A discovery deep beneath a forgotten mine unleashes a stash of enchanted gold carrying a sinister curse. When a group of locals accidentally awakens the Leprechaun’s long‑dormant power, the creature returns with a new obsession: reclaiming every last piece of his “wicked gold.” As the cursed treasure spreads chaos through the town—binding itself to anyone who touches it—a paranormal podcaster, a skeptical techie, and an archaeologist must unravel the gold’s dark origins before the Leprechaun’s magic consumes them all. Blending supernatural horror with razor‑edged humor, Wicked Gold pushes the franchise into its most chaotic hunt yet.
response.title: Leprechaun 9: Wicked Gold
